title: data-kr comps-multiples pack
description: Output of `pack.py --pack comps-multiples`. Multiples-only fetch for anchor + peers via yfinance `info`. **Schema is normalized**: regardless of single (`--ticker`) or batch (`--tickers`) invocation, the result always exposes `info` keyed by ticker — `info: {ticker: {...}}` — so `analysis-comps` consumes one shape. The batch-extraction step in pack.py unwraps the inner per-ticker dict from yfinance_client's batch envelope.

tickers.description: Normalized ticker list (length 1 for single mode, >=2 for batch mode).

info.description: Per-ticker yfinance info dict, keyed by ticker. Single and batch invocations BOTH produce this shape (single = single-key dict).

^[A-Za-z0-9._-]+$.description: yfinance info payload for one ticker. The fields below are the canonical subset relevant for multiples extraction (analysis-comps reads trailingPE / forwardPE / evEbitda / priceToSales / priceToBook).

multiples_set.description: Canonical multiples extracted downstream by analysis-comps.
